use_cases: Theme toggles in Star Wars themed entertainment applications
Interactive on/off controls with animated BB-8 character for gaming interfaces
Dark mode toggles with desert planet scenery aesthetic
Fun settings controls for media streaming or content creation apps
Decorative toggle switches for entertainment or pop culture related websites
ai_summary: An animated Star Wars themed toggle switch featuring the iconic BB-8 droid on a desert planet scenery with stars, planets, and clouds. The switch animates when toggled, moving BB-8 across the scene with visual feedback. Built with styled-components for a fully illustrated, interactive experience suitable for entertainment, gaming, or themed interfaces.
